title: euphorbia hubertii
intro: Euphorbia hubertii, also known as the wheel cactus or stick onsen, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is prized for its unique, wheel-shaped stems and medicinal properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The sap of the Euphorbia hubertii plant is rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, making it effective in reducing swelling and pain, and it has also been used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create salves and ointments that can be applied topically to relieve inflammation and promote wound healing.
